uuid.description: The UUID of this capability resource.

etag.description: The entity tag for the resource.

systemData.description: Metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

name.description: The name of the device attribute.

deviceUuid.description:
The UUID of the device that this attribute belongs to. Used to verify that the device attribute
matches the reverse lookup document and is not for an older device that was deleted and
re-created with the same `deviceName`.

reportedBy.description: The cloud service that reports this device attribute.

properties.description:
Opaque property bag for the reporter named by `reportedBy`. Subtypes (e.g. `UpdateDeviceAttribute`)
narrow this to a typed model. Optionality is kept consistent between the base and every subtype to
avoid emitter bugs around mismatched required/optional in covariant property overrides.

description: A device attribute resource that holds properties managed by cloud services and not sent to the device.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC).

SystemData.description: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

anyOf.description: The update attribute of a device.

DeviceAttributeReportedBy.description: The cloud service that reports a device attribute.
